subcodes.title: Words spoken on 1914-06-08 in Tiberias
subcodes.first_line: God willing, ye shall be always under the protection of the Truth. In your behalf, I seek favor and bounty from the Blessed Beauty. Rest ye assured.
subcodes.subjects: @apostles; early disciples of Christ, @divine grace, bounty, confirmations; spiritual capacity, @steadfastness; perseverance; faithfulness, @tests and trials; sacrifice and suffering, @teaching the Cause; call to teach
